CVE-2023-4156.title: A heap out-of-bounds read flaw was found in builtin.c in the gawk ...
CVE-2023-4156.summary: A heap out-of-bounds read flaw was found in builtin.c in the gawk package. This issue may lead to a crash and could be used to read sensitive information.
